message: Clean up saved games lobby: add timestamps, sorting, delete, and player names
Persist foreign track selection throughout operate phase and update backlog
Fix demand card city highlights persisting across turn change
Simplify endgame resolution: use plain round-boundary check
Fix endgame round resolution and add game-over logging
Fix endgame: AI ends turn immediately when win condition met, last-player trigger resolves without extra round
Tournament endgame (equal turns), randomized turn order, early-game ferry penalty, and first-turn overlay
Wire up endgame system and add flood stranding detection
Region-based batch pruning, ferry multiplier removal, affordability fix, and early-game discard bypass
Fix AI turn estimate: count positioning distance for cross-corridor plans
Fix AI triple same-card dedup and add network maturity upgrade gate
AI scoring improvements: time-budgeted batch pairing, single delivery penalty, dynamic discard thresholds, and timing instrumentation
AI tempo improvements: net profit scoring, upgrade gate fix, and delivery density bonus
Fix AI plan scoring: negative-ROI penalty, stronger overextension, network bonuses, and same-card batch bug
Fix AI island-lock, premature upgrade, and ferry/scoring improvements
Fix AI oscillation loop: advance currentStopIndex when skipping already-carried pickup
Fix AI early-game overextension, abandon-cycle deadlock, and ferry timing
Fix AI ferry movement, batch enumeration crash, and cash drain
Add Brutal AI network-aware scoring, fix upgrade payout bug and ferry city entry cost
Fix AI building on foreign track: detect, skip, and reroute around opponent rails
